ground_truth_summary: Lo-fi album cover titled 'Songs to Stare at the Ceiling To'. Window + ceiling visible. Phrase appears ONCE.

evaluations.notes: Correctly identifies text appears ONCE. Excellent detection of windows, streetlamp, film grain/dust, nebula-like ceiling. Notes surreal/lo-fi aesthetic accurately. No hallucinations.

errors: claims text appears TWICE - real hallucination (only appears once)
evaluations.notes: Text count hallucination - explicitly states 'The text appears twice, centered near the bottom'. Otherwise describes scene accurately, but the repetition claim is a verifiable false statement about the image.

errors: minor: describes 'stars' which are more like dust/speckle
evaluations.notes: Correct single text instance. Solid description of building/windows/streetlight. Describes night sky gradient and retro scratches accurately. Minor inflation of 'stars' interpretation.
Correct text once. Strong interpretation of low-angle ceiling perspective (matches title's theme well). Identifies windows, streetlamp, aurora-like glow, film grain. Thoughtful mood analysis.

errors: minor: interprets glass raindrops/condensation (plausible but not verifiable)
evaluations.notes: Correct single text instance. Rich detailed description including weathered windows, star-speckled sky, dramatic color gradient. Correctly identifies as album cover. Strong analysis.

errors: minor: claims bare tree branches visible (uncertain)
evaluations.notes: Correct text once. Very thorough description. Slightly speculative about tree branches/raindrops outside windows, but within reasonable interpretation. Excellent mood/thematic analysis.

errors: minor: mentions faint silhouettes of tree branches (plausible)
evaluations.notes: Correct single text instance. Excellent description of digitally-altered ceiling resembling galaxy/nebula. Identifies window frame, street lamp, color gradients accurately. Strong film grain / vintage aesthetic recognition.

errors: speculative: claims bed frame/headboard/person's shoulder silhouette - inferred not verifiable
evaluations.notes: Correct text once. Rich atmospheric description. Some inferences about foreground silhouette being bed/headboard/shoulder are speculative but plausible for low-angle lying-down perspective. Strong thematic reading.

errors: minor: describes window as 'reddish-brown painted' / 'double-hung' (specific style claims, plausible)
evaluations.notes: Correct single text instance. Strong description of diagonal composition, wooden window frame, street lamp. Correctly notes ceiling resembles night sky/nebula. Good identification of film grain texture and lo-fi aesthetic.
